languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

languages.text: "Мудрейший, как ты сохраняешь рассудок после зверств этого ксеносского ашмага? Я думала мне худо пришлось, но тебя же он разделал на части как грокса!"
"O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

"O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

languages.text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, ¿cómo consiguió mantener la cordura después de la barbarie de ese xenos ashmag? Pensé que yo lo había pasado mal, ¡pero a usted le descuartizó como a un grox!».
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

traits.locale_text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, ¿cómo consiguió mantener la cordura después de la barbarie de ese xenos ashmag? Pensé que yo lo había pasado mal, ¡pero a usted le descuartizó como a un grox!».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あの野蛮なアシュマグの異種族のむごたらしい仕打ちのあとで、よくぞ正気を保っていられましたねえ？ アタシも散々な目に遭ったと思ってましたけど、あいつはあなた様をグロックスみたいに切り刻んだんですから！」
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あの野蛮なアシュマグの異種族のむごたらしい仕打ちのあとで、よくぞ正気を保っていられましたねえ？ アタシも散々な目に遭ったと思ってましたけど、あいつはあなた様をグロックスみたいに切り刻んだんですから！」

languages.text: “世间最睿智之人啊，在被那个异形坏种折磨过后，你究竟是如何保持理智的？我以为我已经够惨了，可它竟把你当作格洛克斯兽一般屠宰！”
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

traits.locale_text: “世间最睿智之人啊，在被那个异形坏种折磨过后，你究竟是如何保持理智的？我以为我已经够惨了，可它竟把你当作格洛克斯兽一般屠宰！”

languages.text: "Oh weisester aller Männer, wie habt Ihr Euch nach der Barbarei dieses ashmag Xenos Euren Verstand bewahrt? Ich dachte, ich hatte es schwer, aber Euch hat er geschlachtet wie einen Grox!"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh weisester aller Männer, wie habt Ihr Euch nach der Barbarei dieses ashmag Xenos Euren Verstand bewahrt? Ich dachte, ich hatte es schwer, aber Euch hat er geschlachtet wie einen Grox!"

languages.text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, comment avez-vous conservé la raison après les agissements barbares de cet ashmag de xénos ? Je croyais avoir eu la vie dure, mais il vous a massacré comme un grox ! »
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"

traits.locale_text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, comment avez-vous conservé la raison après les agissements barbares de cet ashmag de xénos ? Je croyais avoir eu la vie dure, mais il vous a massacré comme un grox ! »

languages.text: "Ey bilge kimse, o külboğaz zenonun barbarlığından sonra akıl sağlığını nasıl koruyabildin? Ben zor zamanlar geçirdiğimi düşünürdüm. Oysa o seni groks gibi doğradı!"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, how have you kept a grip on your sanity after the barbarity of that ashmag xenos? I thought I'd had it rough, but he butchered you like a grox!"
